description: Designed and implemented AI agents, LLM-powered chatbots, RAG pipelines, and automation tools using LangChain, HuggingFace, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
Deployed AI-powered applications on Amazon AWS Cloud, AWS Bedrock, and Azure AI Foundry, leveraging managed services to ensure scalability, reliability, and secure integration.
Built and maintained production-grade web platforms using Python, PHP, JavaScript, and MySQL, ensuring performance, reliability, and security across multiple high-traffic sites.
Maintained and enhanced a CRM and chatbot platform built with React, Node.js, and Redis, focusing on performance, scalability, and robust error handling in production.
Led a cross-functional team of 4 (design, marketing, sales, and engineering) to ship digital products, online courses, and AI trainings reaching more than 7,000 students.
Developed and maintained the councilor's official WordPress website and blog using HTML, CSS, PHP, and JavaScript, ensuring responsive, accessible, and performant experiences.
Implemented SEO and analytics instrumentation to improve search rankings, monitor user behaviour, and support data-informed content strategy.
Collaborated with communications and policy teams, attending plenary sessions to translate complex topics into clear digital content, improving transparency and citizen engagement.
Engineered a full CMS platform for a travel company using PHP and the CodeIgniter framework, integrating database-driven content, booking logic, and admin tools.
Built custom WordPress themes and backend components aligned with design specs, usability standards, and SEO best practices for performance-focused websites.
Used GitHub for version control and QA workflows, ensuring reliable releases and maintainable codebases.
